1: But he that hateth reproof is is brutish.
2: But a man of wicked devices will he condemn.
3: But the root of the righteous shall not be moved.
4: But she that maketh ashamed is is as rottenness in his bones.
5: But But the counsels of the wicked are are deceit.
6: But the mouth of the upright shall deliver them.
7: But the house of the righteous shall stand.
8: But he that is of a perverse heart shall be despised.
9: Than he that honoureth himself, and lacketh bread.
10: But the tender mercies of the wicked are are cruel.
11: But he that followeth vain persons is persons is void of understanding.
12: But the root of the righteous yieldeth fruit fruit .
13: But the just shall come out of trouble.
14: And the recompence of a man's hands shall be rendered unto him.
15: But he that hearkeneth unto counsel is is wise.
16: But a prudent man man covereth shame.
18: But the tongue of the wise is is health.
19: But a lying tongue is is but for a moment.
20: But to the counsellors of peace is is joy.
21: But the wicked shall be filled with mischief.
22: But they that deal truly are are his delight.
23: But the heart of fools proclaimeth foolishness.
24: But the slothful shall be under tribute.
25: But a good word maketh it glad.
26: But the way of the wicked seduceth them.
27: But the substance of a diligent man is is precious.
28: And in in the pathway thereof there is thereof there is no death.
